title: Regex Visualizer
description: A developer utility for exploring, testing and understanding regular expressions through visualization, pattern explanation and live testing.
overview: Regex Visualizer is a developer tool designed to help understand and debug regular expressions through visual representations, explanations and interactive testing. Instead of reading complex patterns line by line, developers can explore how the regex engine interprets each token and see matches highlighted directly in the text.
problem: Regular expressions are powerful but notoriously difficult to read, learn and debug. Developers often struggle to understand complex patterns, especially when expressions contain multiple groups, quantifiers and conditions. Without proper visualization tools, debugging regex patterns becomes slow and error-prone.
solution: Regex Visualizer parses regular expressions into tokens, validates them, highlights matches in real time and provides a structured cheatsheet for quick reference. It combines visual diagrams, explanations and interactive testing so developers can experiment with regex patterns and immediately see how they behave.

features.title: Regex Input
features.description: Write or paste a regular expression to analyze and test.

features.title: Regex Validation
features.description: Automatically detect invalid regex patterns and display meaningful error messages.

features.title: Pattern Parser
features.description: Break the regular expression into structured tokens that can be visualized.

features.title: Visual Diagram
features.description: Display regex tokens as visual nodes to help developers understand pattern structure.

features.title: Live Test Strings
features.description: Paste or write text to test against the regex pattern.

features.title: Match Highlighting
features.description: Highlight matching segments directly inside the test text.

features.title: Match Counter
features.description: Show the total number of matches detected in the input text.

features.title: Regex Explanation Panel
features.description: Explain common regex tokens (\d, \w, quantifiers, etc.) to help users understand what each pattern means.

features.title: Regex Cheatsheet
features.description: Provide a categorized cheatsheet of common regex patterns with explanations.

features.title: Insert Pattern from Cheatsheet
features.description: Allow users to click a cheatsheet pattern and automatically insert it into the regex input.

features.title: Responsive Developer UI
features.description: A responsive multi-column layout for exploring regex documentation while testing patterns.

implementation:
const tokens = regex.split(/(\(|\)|\+|\*|\?|\|)/)

return tokens.map(token => ({ type: 'token', value: token }))

developmentFlow.title: Idea
developmentFlow.description: Create a developer tool to visualize and experiment with regular expressions.

developmentFlow.title: Regex Parser
developmentFlow.description: Build a parser that converts regex patterns into tokens.

developmentFlow.title: Live Testing
developmentFlow.description: Allow users to test regex patterns against arbitrary text input.

developmentFlow.title: Visualization
developmentFlow.description: Render regex tokens visually to help developers understand pattern structure.

developmentFlow.title: Documentation Layer
developmentFlow.description: Add a cheatsheet and explanation system to help users learn regex patterns.

lessons: Understanding how regex engines process tokens sequentially.
Designing developer tools that combine documentation and experimentation.
Building parser logic for pattern interpretation.
Managing interactive diagrams within a React UI.
Designing developer-focused UI patterns similar to playground tools.
nextSteps: Support advanced regex features such as lookaheads, lookbehinds and named groups.
Add step-by-step regex execution visualization to show how the engine processes text.
Allow exporting diagrams as SVG or PNG for documentation.
Implement a regex match inspector showing match index, length and captured groups.
Add regex examples library (emails, URLs, dates, phone numbers, IDs).
Add copy-to-clipboard functionality for cheatsheet patterns.
Implement a regex builder UI that helps users construct patterns visually.
Integrate AI assistance to generate regex from natural language descriptions.
Add performance indicators for large text inputs and complex regex patterns.
